programme.title: Martin: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: An accident happens when Martin and Gina are caring for Mama Payne's beloved parrot.

programme.title: Martin: Fat Like Dat
programme.desc: When Gina convinces Martin that he's gaining weight, he and the guys take dieting and exercise to the extreme.

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 1)
programme.desc: After Gina and Pam get promotions, Martin realizes his job is going nowhere.

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Martin takes steps to ensure that he gets on Varnel Hill's talk show.

programme.title: Martin: Thanks for Nothing
programme.desc: Thanksgiving gets interesting when Martin's relatives and Gina's parents come to dinner.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Cased Up
programme.desc: Philip defends Will when he is involved in a car accident with Hilary's boyfriend.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Hi-Ho Silver
programme.desc: Will and Carlton suspect the neighbours of stealing the family's heirloom silverware.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Butler Did It
programme.desc: Will and the children rent the house out to a production company for a music video shoot.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Something for Nothing
programme.desc: Will wins $1,000 at a charity fund raiser and refuses to donate it back to charity.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Christmas Show
programme.desc: A stranger robs the Banks family after Will generously invites him into their cabin.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Hilary Gets a Life
programme.desc: Hilary is in a jam after embellishing her resume, then landing a catering job that's more than she can handle.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Will is certain he will get a scholarship, until he learns the truth about his competitor.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Geoffrey Cleans Up
programme.desc: Geoffrey discovers that his new love is a wealthy heiress and not a domestic servant.

programme.title: Movie: Coming to America
programme.desc: An African prince travels to America to avoid an arranged marriage and find a new bride.

programme.title: Movie: White Men Can't Jump
programme.desc: A white con artist teams up with a black basketball hustler and con their way across the country.

programme.title: Movie: Love on the Slopes
programme.desc: A copy-editor is sent to a resort to write a story for a competition. While there, she tries out skiing and finds herself falling for an extreme-sports competitor.

programme.title: Movie: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: When Fiona gets dumped she heads for a week in Vermont at her Dad's country Inn. There she runs into her ex with his new girlfriend. She strikes a deal with the Inn's chef, Derek, to be her 'boyfriend' for the week.

programme.title: Movie: Summer Villa
programme.desc: A romance novelist with writer's block and a celebrity chef suffering from a bad review accidentally end up staying at the same French villa for the summer. A connection grows as they attempt to share the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her brother in-law and is taken back by his resemblance to her deceased husband. She quickly finds herself falling in love with hopes of marriage.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors
programme.desc: Dorothy wants to fulfill her ambition to become a stand-up comic.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All That Jazz
programme.desc: Dorothy's son shows up, jobless and wifeless, and wanting to be a free spirit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebb Tide
programme.desc: Dorothy accompanies Blanche to Atlanta for Big Daddy's funeral.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Have Yourself a Very Little Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas is driving everyone a little crazy as they all search for the perfect gifts.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mary Has a Little Lamb
programme.desc: Dorothy aids a pregnant and unwed teen who was rejected by her father.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Loves Roz
programme.desc: When Roz decides to date one of Niles' patients, Frasier tries to find a way to warn Roz without breaching his ethical obligation for confidentiality. Roz soon mistakes his attempts to warn her for subtle declarations of yearning.

programme.title: Frasier: The Focus Group
programme.desc: Frasier is puzzled when a single member of a focus group dislikes his radio show. Frasier's quest to understand why becomes an obsession and he inadvertently ruins the man's life.

programme.title: Frasier: You Can Go Home Again
programme.desc: To celebrate Frasier's third anniversary at the radio station, Roz gives Frasier a copy of his first broadcast. As he listens, Frasier remembers the events that occurred when he first arrived in Seattle and reunited with his family.

programme.title: Frasier: The Two Mrs. Cranes
programme.desc: When Daphne's ex-fiancé comes to visit, she quickly introduces him to her 'new husband,' Niles. Martin stirs up trouble when he decides to introduce Roz as Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: Love Bites the Dog
programme.desc: Roz sets Frasier up with a gorgeous woman, who takes a shine to Bulldog instead. But when she dumps him, Bulldog becomes so distraught that Frasier has to take over his show. Meanwhile, Niles places an ad to attract more patients.

programme.title: Frasier: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles struggle to interpret Frasier's recurring dream, in which Frasier finds himself in bed with the radio station's restaurant critic.

programme.title: Frasier: A Crane's Critique
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are ecstatic when Martin becomes good friends with a reclusive author. Trouble ensues when they discover the author's new manuscript.

programme.title: Frasier: Head Games
programme.desc: Niles' brief session with a slumping basketball star turns the athlete's fortunes around. He is soon mortified to learn that the player believes his good luck is not due to Niles' advice, but to Niles' hair.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy's Night in Town
programme.desc: Lucy dreams of a night in New York City and it turns into a nightmare.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Housewarming
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky believe their neighbours are giving them a housewarming party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Building a B-B-Q
programme.desc: Lucy has trouble getting Ricky away so she can do her housework, so she suggests a BBQ.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Country Club Dance
programme.desc: Lucy leads a revolt among the housewives when their husbands flirt with a visitor.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Rose is touting the power of positive thinking; Blanche's beau has a heart attack.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Triple Play
programme.desc: Miles introduces Rose to his daughter Caroline; Blanche rents a Mercedes to attract men.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Clinton Avenue Memoirs
programme.desc: After digging out the family album, Sophia wants to visit their old home in Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Like the Beep Beep of the Tom-Tom
programme.desc: Blanche knows she needs a pacemaker, but she fears it'll halt her sex life.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: An Illegitimate Concern
programme.desc: A young man identifies himself as the illegitimate son of Blanche's late husband George.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 72 Hours
programme.desc: Rose discovers that she may be carrying the HIV virus after learning the blood they used in her gallbladder operation may have contained HIV antibodies.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actors Galadriel Stineman and Kevin Joy from 'From the Heart' stop by for a visit. Do some cooking with Chef Chris Valdes.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Sit down with TV host and New York Times bestselling-author Kristin Cavallari and 'This is Us' actor Sterling K. Brown.

programme.title: Movie: Love Unleashed
programme.desc: A woman hosts a puppy party and in attendance is a single father. She teaches him the value of adding a puppy to his home, and along the way, they fall in love.

programme.title: Movie: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: A wedding planner in New York is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be her ex.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms
programme.desc: Butters is selling vape pens and all kinds of fruity-flavored vape accessories at school. Randy decides he should move the family to the country and take up farming.

programme.title: South Park: Mexican Joker
programme.desc: Randy fights against home-grown. Meanwhile, Kyle goes to camp.

programme.title: South Park: Band in China

programme.title: South Park: SHOTS!!!
programme.desc: Randy celebrates the success of Tegridy Farms while Cartman refuses to get a shot.

programme.title: South Park: Let Them Eat Goo
programme.desc: Cartman is sure the new plant-based diet in the school cafeteria gave him a heart attack.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms Halloween Special
programme.desc: It’s Halloween and Randy is dealing with his daughter’s marijuana problem.

programme.title: South Park: Season Finale
programme.desc: The citizens of South Park have had enough of Randy and Tegridy Farms and they just want to lock him up.

programme.desc: The on-going Pandemic presents endless challenges to the citizens of South Park.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Donahue/ Baker
programme.desc: A glamorous southern belle swaps places with a mother of six who helps run a dairy farm.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Let's Talk About Sex, Baby

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Marquez Family Episode 4
programme.desc: The inside and outside of the Marquez home continue to be transformed. Entertainment and Fitness surprises are installed to help the family exercise and relax.

programme.title: The Closer: Borderline
programme.desc: Leaving the scene of an accident to get to a multiple homicide scene, Brenda finds herself unable to drive the streets of L.A. Once she gets to the crime scene, she and the PHD are faced with another challenge.

programme.title: The Closer: No Good Deed
programme.desc: When the star witness in a death-row inmate's appeal case is gunned down, Brenda and her team discover that there is more than one suspect with a motive. Meanwhile, Chief Pope's vengeful ex-wife airs Brenda's secrets in front of her team.

programme.title: The Closer: Overkill
programme.desc: Brenda and Fritz have a hard time agreeing who is in charge when an informant's wife and FBI agent are both murdered. Brenda discovers that she and the PHD must work quickly when the leading witness in the case testifies against a powerful mobster.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Don't Stop Dancing, Girl
programme.desc: The world of competitive dance turns deadly when the mother of a star performer is stabbed to death. Jane and the team search for clues, but soon learn that something is off in the woman's history.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Burning Down the House
programme.desc: When a warehouse fire kills a firefighter, Jane and Maura must investigate whether it was arson or an accident.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: What Doesn't Kill You
programme.desc: Jane and Maura's friendship suffers following the shooting of Maura's biological father, gangster Paddy Doyle. Jane also finds herself in the middle of an Internal Affairs investigation and her relationship with Agent Dean is exposed.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Beckman-Heskett/ Childs
programme.desc: A theologically liberal high-powered corporate executive mother with a stay-at-home husband swaps lives with a born-again Christian mother who believes women are created to be a man's helpmate.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Gillette/ Turner
programme.desc: A meticulous, structured wife who raises her kids to be the best and brightest swaps lives with a laid-back mom who lets her kids run wild in the travelling carnival she owns and operates with her husband.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Coste/ Ives
programme.desc: A wife who dotes on her two daredevil motorbike stunt driving sons and her gas guzzling husband swaps lives with an eco-friendly artist who makes her kids ride their bikes in the Arizona heat in order to save the planet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video
programme.desc: Stories of true crime that incorporate video evidence.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Horror in Apartment 345
programme.desc: Gorgeous 27-year-old Sasha Samsudean appears to be sexually assaulted and is found strangled in her luxury downtown Orlando apartment. Shocking surveillance video and a slew of clues ultimately lead investigators to the killer.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Chained by a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Prominent realtor Todd Kohlhepp’s double life is exposed when police launch a dramatic rescue – all caught on body camera – of a young woman chained like a dog inside a shipping container on his property.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Crazy, Sexy and Deadly
programme.desc: Shayna Hubers and Ryan Poston seemed like a match made in heaven, until he ends up dead in a pool of blood, shot in the face. Stunning interrogation tapes leave cops in disbelief and lead investigators to a surprising motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Legend of Jesse James
programme.desc: Josh journeys across the American Midwest in search of the legendary golden loot of Jesse James. Along the way, Josh debunks Jesse James myths, rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mt. and follows treasure hunters into Buzzards Roost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunting Vampires
programme.desc: Josh explores the history of vampirism in Romania and Bulgaria.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: King Me!
programme.desc: Josh dares to celebrate America's horror master, Stephen King. Josh talks screen screams from some of King's most memorable work with Anthony Michael Hall (The Dead Zone), David Morse (The Green Mile), Dee Wallace (Cujo) and Danny Lloyd (The Shining).

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Joy, Sparkle, and Pain
programme.desc: Only two spots remain in the Tournament of Champions, where the winner will claim Dodgeball supremacy and a $25,000 prize. A ninja dazzles the competition with theatricality and deception. A queen tries to claim her crown.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Mother of All Thunderdomes
programme.desc: Exploding balls, a barrage of buckshot and a new adversary making its debut all plague contestants competing for a shot at the $25,000 grand prize. A realtor tries to close the deal and a hospital administrator may need his employee discount.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ghost Ship of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: Josh tackles the mystery of The Griffon, the first ship to be lost in the Great Lakes. With a state-of-the-art submarine, Josh dives to find a ship so elusive that it's known as 'The Holy Grail of Shipwrecks'.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: King Me!
programme.desc: Josh dares to celebrate America's horror master, Stephen King. Josh talks screen screams from some of King's most memorable work with Anthony Michael Hall (The Dead Zone), David Morse (The Green Mile), Dee Wallace (Cujo) and Danny Lloyd (The Shining).

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Joy, Sparkle, and Pain

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Mother of All Thunderdomes
programme.desc: Exploding balls, a barrage of buckshot and a new adversary making its debut all plague contestants competing for a shot at the $25,000 grand prize. A realtor tries to close the deal and a hospital administrator may need his employee discount.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Atlantis of the Andes
programme.desc: Josh dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. During the investigation, Josh discovers multiple structures of the ancient Tiwanaku people including ruins hidden in the lake's depths, dubbed 'the Atlantis of the Andes.'

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Conquering Alaska
programme.desc: John, our extreme survival instructor, is put to the test as he's taken down in broad daylight and dropped on an Alaskan glacier with little more than a pool cue to defend himself.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Green Hell
programme.desc: Matt, our primitive skills expert, is snatched from his surfboard and dumped into the Costa Rican jungle in his flip-flops. Treacherous waterfalls, poisonous snakes and blood-sucking ticks abound.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Embrace the Suck
programme.desc: Terry, our Green Beret, is ambushed on vacation and tossed out of an airplane into the middle of the ocean in the Gulf of Mexico. Facing the threat of dehydration and freezing conditions, will Terry's training help him survive the challenge and find land?

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Volcano Nightmare
programme.desc: Jake, our former Navy SEAL, is ambushed and dumped atop a volcano in Iceland. Facing deadly avalanche fields, boiling mud pits and sulphuric geysers, Jake could lose more than the game when he makes a near-fatal error in the land of fire and ice.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Army Veteran Tom is captured, hooded, handcuffed and dropped on a volcano in the wilderness of Chile. He'll need all his bushcraft skills to scale glaciers, conquer an impenetrable jungle and brave the desolation as he races to find civilization.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Shipwrecked
programme.desc: Dave and Cody find themselves on a deserted island off the coast of Nova Scotia, in the middle of winter. They have only a few items with them for survival, some knives and an emergency blanket, and they need to build a shelter.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Panic in the Jungle
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on a lost hiker scenario in the sweltering jungles of Laos. The two must bushwhack their way through dense terrain equipped with items a backpacker might carry: a 35 mm camera, condoms and a pack of cigarettes.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Failed Ascent
programme.desc: Cody and Dave have encountered their worst nightmare, being trapped on top of a mountain in New Zealand. They must make their way down safely through the glacial peaks and deadly crevasses and use Cody's knowledge of the local culture to find food.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of Air
programme.desc: Dave and Cody head to Belize to get lost deep inside a maze of caves with only their dive gear.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Desert Breakdown
programme.desc: Dave and Cody head to Peru's 'Valley of the Volcanoes' to take on a lost-in -the-desert scenario. They are thrown into a lava-scorched land with few survival resources.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Split Up
programme.desc: Dave and Cody find themselves in a nightmarish scenario they are miles apart in the jungle. They must trek through the tough terrain to find each other and make their way to civilization.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Swamped
programme.desc: Cody and Dave head out to the Louisiana swamps to spend some time with the snakes and gators.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Soaked
programme.desc: Dave and Cody are soaked and left in a rainforest; it will take their keen navigational skills to get them out.

programme.desc: Carrie wonders why her guy won't hit the sheets; Miranda discovers she has an STD.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Drama Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous about meeting Aidan's family; Charlotte meets a doctor.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Big Time
programme.desc: Carrie bumps into Big at a party; Samantha fears menopause; Miranda breaks up with Steve.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Easy Come, Easy Go
programme.desc: Charlotte prompts Trey to propose; Big encounters Carrie and Aidan at a furniture show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Carrie's fling weighs on her conscience; Charlotte plays hardball over a pre-nup.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Running With Scissors
programme.desc: Carrie seeks advice about Big; Samantha's new guy wants her to be tested for AIDS.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Khloé's New Breast Friends
programme.desc: Kim finds herself in a major ordeal when she unknowingly upsets her mom after helping Cait get ready for the ESPY awards. Meanwhile, Khloé tests out life with bigger breasts, and Scott searches for a healthy way to keep himself occupied.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord Disick Returns
programme.desc: The family heads to San Diego for MJ's birthday, but Rob bails and goes missing after a fight with Chyna. Meanwhile, Scott goes to great lengths to resurrect the Lord after much prodding from the family, and Kim struggles with doing North's hair.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord of the Cougars
programme.desc: Kendall suffers from sleep paralysis, which threatens her work and travel life. Meanwhile, Kim searches for methods to control her anxiety and Scott develops an unlikely friendship with Kris and her girlfriends.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Controversies and Legacies
programme.desc: Kim's decision to try for a third child proves to be a matter of life and death. Meanwhile Kendall fears backlash from supporting stricter gun control, and Kris gets emotional upon recognizing her mom won't be around forever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Good Deeds
programme.desc: With Rob's baby only a month away, the family is excited to celebrate and go all out to plan a baby shower for the couple, but, when Rob and Chyna get into a fight, the party is ruined.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Pilot
programme.desc: Terry Bradshaw is the ultimate dad to his three daughters, but struggles to fix their career and relationship problems while preparing to drive in a Monster Jam rally in Dallas.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Rachel is with the wrong guy and everyone in the family can see it but her. While Terry and Zurie get payback on Tammy after years of her pranks, Lacey and Noah consider moving back to Texas to be closer to family.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Rihanna dishes on her latest lingerie collection.

programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Ultimate GGG Rematch
programme.desc: The top two finalists from the Triple G tournaments return for a chance to win in this head-to-head rematch. First up is a Redemption redo, next Tournament of Champions finalists take each other on and finally, Diners, Drive-ins and Dives chefs face off.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Guys

programme.title: Big City Greens: Times Circle/ Super Gramma

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Jessie: Lizard Scales and Wrestling Tales
programme.desc: Luke is assigned a school report about his family history and asks his adoptive mom Christina for information about his birthparents.

programme.title: Jessie: The Blind Date, the Cheapskate and the Primate
programme.desc: To prove that she's over Tony, Jessie decides that she and Tony will set each other up with other people.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Fog'd In

programme.desc: Uncover the source, process and people behind copper, the metal of the digital age, and explore a global mining powerhouse where a spectacular production process yields 250,000 tons of pure copper every year worth over $1.5 billion dollars.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Arctic's Toughest
programme.desc: The world's only actual all-terrain vehicle is an Arctic mega monster that can conquer land, snow, and water in dangerous conditions; elsewhere in avalanche country, only one machine can climb deadly mountains and protect a major highway.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Mission Las Vegas
programme.desc: Brave lighting technicians battle extreme desert conditions to keep the lights bright in Las Vegas; they put their lives at stake to perform risky neon bulb replacements at terrifying heights and surrounded by hundreds of volts of electricity.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: High-Wire Hell
programme.desc: Working thousands of feet above the California desert, brave engineers and fearless crews perform perilous high-wire acts to keep the hi-tech tramway system operating safely for the hundreds of daily tourists it transports.

programme.desc: Uncover the source, process and people behind copper, the metal of the digital age, and explore a global mining powerhouse where a spectacular production process yields 250,000 tons of pure copper every year worth over $1.5 billion dollars.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Life in Hell
programme.desc: A UFO crashes in Pennsylvania. Was it a secret Soviet satellite, or something far more dangerous? On Mercury, NASA finds the impossible: frozen water. A strange object causes a skyscraper-sized shadow on the surface of Mars' largest moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Top Secret Terror
programme.desc: Was the Moon landing faked? Images of Mercury reveal massive spider-like formations on its surface. Is it an odd geological formation, or something much more ominous? A classified space shuttle mission ends in near-disaster. What was its secret mission?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Lethal Weapons
programme.desc: A look at how pictures from the Hubble telescope made the comet of the century look like an alien spacecraft. And exploring the question of whether earth has already been invaded by alien organisms.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Hammer of Thor
programme.desc: Burning lights in the skies above Nevada and Utah might be signs of a secret space weapons project; a look at what the mysterious trails on the lunar surface near the Apollo landing sites are; and a strange space object might mean disaster.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Spacewalk of Doom
programme.desc: An astronaut on a spacewalk begins to drown.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Twisted Plan
programme.desc: When trusted legal assistant Gail Spencer fails to show up for work, her coworkers are rightfully concerned. But as the sordid details of her abduction come to light, suddenly it seems like someone at the office may know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: See No Evil: Right Man, Wrong Man
programme.desc: On June 12th 2013, family man Richard Arenas is gunned down in broad daylight in the driveway of his suburban home with no apparent motive or witnesses.

programme.title: See No Evil: Far From Home
programme.desc: In 2017, Chinese exchange student, Yingying Zhang, mysteriously vanishes from the University of Illinois campus. Police and FBI turn to video surveillance footage to uncover the shocking and sinister reality and bring a cold-blooded murderer to justice.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: A strange man violently attempts to kidnap a woman's children, but a 16-year old wrestler saves the day. And then, when a frightening cab robbery takes place in broad daylight, someone unexpected comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With My Kid
programme.desc: Two armed thieves approach a young woman to steal her car. But they get a shock when she fights back. And then, the father of a 15-year-old girl sets up a family sting to apprehend the 33-year-old man who is trying to seduce her.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Sex, Lies and Crimes
programme.desc: A scandalous affair between a tutor and student; Young father's shocking lie; An attorney blindsided by an angry client's fist; Man threatens to kill judge; Bailiff's shoe saves an escapee's life; Judge and defendant have shared past.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Figure in the Shadows
programme.desc: A shocking crime jolts a small town when a young woman disappears and is later found dead. The last person seen with her-- a mysterious figure in camouflage. Investigators focus on several suspects, and one is convicted.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Caught in the Act

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Sex, Lies and Crimes
programme.desc: A scandalous affair between a tutor and student; Young father's shocking lie; An attorney blindsided by an angry client's fist; Man threatens to kill judge; Bailiff's shoe saves an escapee's life; Judge and defendant have shared past.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Dying to Be Famous

programme.title: See No Evil: Right Man, Wrong Man
programme.desc: On June 12th 2013, family man Richard Arenas is gunned down in broad daylight in the driveway of his suburban home with no apparent motive or witnesses.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: On November 7, 2014, 69-year old Ina Clare Richardson is found brutally murdered in a public park in Clarkston, Washington. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras to piece together the puzzle of her fateful final night.

programme.title: See No Evil: Mr. Reed Will See You
programme.desc: Keith Reed is found gunned down on his doorstep. What seems like a possible crime of passion is turned on its head after a surprise discovery. Surveillance footage helps police unravel the mystery behind Keith's death and just who killed him.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Mystery in the Swamp
programme.desc: The morning of his anniversary, Mike Williams goes duck hunting. When he fails to return home that afternoon, an all-out search commences. But it's only the beginning of a sordid mystery that will take close to 20 years to solve.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Long Island Serial Killer: The Lost Girls
programme.desc: When a vivacious young escort, Shannan Gilbert, vanishes on Long Island's south shore in 2010, her disappearance leads police to discover the bodies of ten other victims dumped by a serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Long Island Serial Killer: New Revelations
programme.desc: The discovery of four women's bodies on Gilgo Beach was just the beginning. But who is the Long Island Serial Killer? Investigators uncover multiple suspects and shocking theories, as they race to capture this prolific killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Dumped and Dangerous
programme.desc: When their love life goes sour these Deadly Women take lethal revenge. They are 'Dumped and Dangerous.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill the Competition
programme.desc: In the game of love the stakes are high not everyone can be a winner.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Leaves Town
programme.desc: With hearts of stone, these Deadly Women give their men special send-offs when 'Love Leaves Town.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Broken Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women brutally turned on family and in-laws.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep
programme.desc: Brittney Cosby and Crystal Jackson are an ambitious couple living in Houston, Texas. When their lifeless bodies are found near a dumpster, authorities comb through the evidence until the shocking identity of their killer is revealed.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Memorial Day Murder
programme.desc: Chris Northam is an entrepreneur building his extreme sports business in the suburb of Roseville, California. When he is fatally gunned down in his warehouse, detectives look to his disgruntled employees and his mistress in search of the killer.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Wolf and the Sheep
programme.desc: Kevin and Tabatha Bryant are a picture-perfect couple, living with their two young sons in Penfield, New York. But when Tabatha is found stabbed to death at home, a steamy affair and many double lives are revealed to the town's unsuspecting residents.

programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Log Jam
programme.desc: Mark hires a family friend to build a custom log house for him to retire in. The budget has been maxed out and the home isn’t done, so he sends out an SOS that Mike Holmes answers.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tacos

programme.desc: When Martin's CD Walkman disappears, he accuses all of his good friends of taking it.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part One)
programme.desc: Gina is offered a job in New York and Martin, taking advice from Stan, tells her to take it.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part Two)
programme.desc: With Gina out of his life, Martin reconsiders his decision to let her go to New York to move on with her life, and he sets out to win her back.

programme.title: Martin: Arms Are for Hugging
programme.desc: Martin and Gina admit that they are fighting and arguing too much, so they seek the help of a church Minister for counselling.

programme.title: Martin: Guard Your Grill
programme.desc: After winning a charity boxing match, Martin thinks he is as good a fighter as anyone. After Tommy Hearns makes advances towards Gina, Martin challenges the boxer to a 10-round grudge match.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Ill Will
programme.desc: While in the hospital for a tonsillectomy, Will learns to look at life a little differently from his roommate, a wisecracking senior citizen.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Eyes on the Prize
programme.desc: Will appears on a TV game show and picks his cousin to be his teammate over his friends.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Those Were the Days
programme.desc: An activist's story about the civil rights movement inspires Will to lead his own protest.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Vying for Attention
programme.desc: Will becomes childishly jealous when his mother arrives for a visit with a new boyfriend.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Aunt Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Will and Carlton's plans of having the house to themselves are spoiled by Will's aunt.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Be My Baby Tonight
programme.desc: Ashley can't get her folks to understand the sexual attraction she has for her boyfriend.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Striptease for Two
programme.desc: Will and Carleton perform as male strippers in order to recover pawned jewellery.

programme.title: Movie: Grease
programme.desc: A leather-jacketed boy and a goody-two-shoes girl fall in and out of love in the 1950s.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: A guy and a girl try to maintain a physical relationship only without expecting more from each other.

programme.title: Movie: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: A wedding planner in New York is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be her ex.

programme.title: Movie: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: Movie: Pumpkin Pie Wars
programme.desc: Two ladies have led a small-town family feud for years with the pumpkin bake-off at the annual harvest festival. This year, the buck is being passed to Casey and Sam, their kids. However, they fall head over heels in love with each other.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Rose is touting the power of positive thinking; Blanche's beau has a heart attack.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Triple Play
programme.desc: Miles introduces Rose to his daughter Caroline; Blanche rents a Mercedes to attract men.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Clinton Avenue Memoirs
programme.desc: After digging out the family album, Sophia wants to visit their old home in Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Like the Beep Beep of the Tom-Tom
programme.desc: Blanche knows she needs a pacemaker, but she fears it'll halt her sex life.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: An Illegitimate Concern
programme.desc: A young man identifies himself as the illegitimate son of Blanche's late husband George.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 72 Hours
programme.desc: Rose discovers that she may be carrying the HIV virus after learning the blood they used in her gallbladder operation may have contained HIV antibodies.

programme.title: Frasier: Mixed Doubles
programme.desc: When Daphne breaks up with her boyfriend, Niles feels ready to declare his feelings for her. Frasier convinces him it could be a mistake, until Daphne has an encounter with a Niles-like man at a singles bar.

programme.title: Frasier: A Lilith Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Lilith summons Frasier to Boston during Thanksgiving for an interview with Frederick.

programme.title: Frasier: Our Father Whose Art Ain't Heaven
programme.desc: Martin misinterprets Frasier's polite compliment of a painting and buys it for his son. Frasier struggles with his feelings of disappointment and decides to follow Niles' lead of telling him directly.

programme.title: Frasier: Dad Loves Sherry, the Boys Just Whine
programme.desc: After Maureen breaks up with him, Martin asks out someone he's had his eye on. Much to Frasier and Niles' horror, she is a loud, brassy banjo-playing waitress. Frasier and Niles cover up their true feelings, until Sherry takes Daphne's banquet ticket.

programme.title: Frasier: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: Martin is appalled when Frasier admits he pulled a prank in prep school and blamed it on a bully, who was expelled because of the incident. Out of guilt, Frasier tracks the man down and visits him in prison, but has trouble confessing the truth.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Days of the Condo
programme.desc: When his request to install a doorknocker is denied, Frasier challenges the condo association president, Ms. Langer, by running against her in the election.

programme.title: Frasier: Death and the Dog
programme.desc: When Eddie becomes lethargic and refuses to eat, Martin tries everything to perk him up. He hires a dog psychiatrist to determine the cause of this depression.

programme.title: Frasier: Four for the Seesaw
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier's spontaneous gesture of sharing a table with two beautiful women leads them to a double date at a country cabin. Frasier then tries to help Niles overcome the feeling that he's betraying Maris.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Raises Tulips
programme.desc: Lucy is determined to beat Betty Ramsey in Westport's 'Best-looking Garden' contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Ricardos Dedicate a Statue
programme.desc: Lucy mixes into community affairs and almost gets removed from the community.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Girls Want to Go to a Nightclub
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' anniversary, the girls want to get dressed up and go to a club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Be a Pal
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she follows a book's advice.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Twice in a Lifetime
programme.desc: Rose briefly rekindles a romance she had with Buzz Mueller, but realizes she loves Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sisters and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Blanche is dumbfounded to discover that her sister, Charmaine, has written a novel.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Cheaters
programme.desc: Dorothy surprises herself and her housemates by having a relationship with a married man.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Mangiacavallo Curse Makes a Lousy Wedding Present
programme.desc: Sophia disrupts a wedding celebration by saying that she cursed the groom's grandfather.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: Dorothy risks everything when she lets her gambling problem get out of control.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: American singer and actress Dionne Warwick talks about her documentary 'House of Cardin.' We also sit down with actor Tom Cavanagh.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actors Galadriel Stineman and Kevin Joy from 'From the Heart' stop by for a visit. Do some cooking with Chef Chris Valdes.

programme.title: Movie: Under the Autumn Moon
programme.desc: An ambitious executive seeks out the perfect ranch for a corporate retreat, but when she stumbles upon a charming cowboy, she is presented with an offer she cannot refuse.

programme.title: Movie: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: A man and woman are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: The Office: Murder
programme.desc: Michael is troubled by rumours about Dunder Mifflin, and forces the office into a day of strange diversions. Andy figures out that the chief obstacle he has to overcome is his own awkwardness.

programme.title: The Office: Share Holders Meeting
programme.desc: When Michael learns he is going to be honoured at the Dunder Mifflin shareholder meeting in New York City, he brings Andy, Dwight and Oscar with him. Jim is left in charge of the office, and has a hard time getting Ryan to do any work.

programme.title: The Office: Scott's Tots
programme.desc: Michael has to face the music when he realizes he cannot keep a promise he made to a group of kids 10 years earlier.

programme.title: The Office: The Banker
programme.desc: When a potential buyer comes to Dunder Mifflin, Michael, Dwight, Andy and Pam pull out all the stops in the hopes of impressing him with their high profile contacts. Michael reminisces about all the great times they have had in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Sabre
programme.desc: When Sabre comes in to take over Dunder Mifflin, Michael struggles to accept the new policies. Pam and Jim have an interview at the daycare they are hoping to get accepted into.

programme.title: The Office: The Manager and the Salesman
programme.desc: Sabre's CEO visits and tells Michael and Jim that one of them must take a step down and go back to sales.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam's contractions begin but she and Jim are determined to wait it out as long as possible so they can have more time at the hospital. The office tries to distract Pam from the pain by entertaining her.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam and Jim make a blunder after their baby's birth; Michael sets up Erin with Kevin.

programme.title: The Office: St. Patrick's Day
programme.desc: Michael thinks he has impressed Jo, only to learn that someone else in the office has caught her eye.

programme.title: The Office: New Leads
programme.desc: When the sales staff lets Sabre's new 'sales is king' policy get to their heads, Michael hides their new, prized leads.

programme.title: South Park: The Pandemic Special
programme.desc: The on-going Pandemic presents endless challenges to the citizens of South Park.

programme.desc: One day the citizens of South Park wake up and find the Internet is gone. When Randy hears there may still be some Internet out in California, he packs up his family and heads west.

programme.title: South Park: Whale Whores
programme.desc: Stan takes action to stop the Japanese from killing the world's whales and dolphins.

programme.title: South Park: The Poor Kid

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Behind the Mystery Special
programme.desc: Friedreich's Ataxia--a rare, genetic disease that causes progressive nervous system damage and movement problems; how Leukemia and Lymphoma Society is helping those undergoing clinical trials.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Home Cheapo
programme.desc: When Carrie learns that Deacon and Kelly bought a second home, she convinces Doug that they were able to afford it because they are so cheap.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl
programme.desc: Carrie is supportive at first of Doug's cleaner approach to life, but quickly grows tired of him trying to force his new beliefs on her and having to eat meat while in private.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mild Bunch
programme.desc: A prank runs amok when Doug and his pal reunite at their 20th high school reunion and decide to have some fun with their old principal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Poisonous Affair
programme.desc: When cancer researcher Dr. George Blumenschein ends up admitted at his own hospital a toxic work environment may be to blame.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.
